children cared communities strong future bright," Rendell said. families continue share concerns about inability navigate complex systems those concerns addressed cabinet. cabinet recommendations creatively service delivery systems children families responsive, efficient effective."
order establishes members cabinet secretaries Public Welfare, Education, Health, Labor Industry; Secretary Budget; Insurance Commissioner; directors Office Health Reform Governor's Office Policy; Governor's Chief Staff; chairpersons Juvenile Court Judges' Commission Commission Crime Delinquency. Secretary Public Welfare Estelle Richman chair cabinet. Lance Simmens named executive director.
Simmens served senior-level positions Carter Clinton administrations Small Business Administration, Department Health Human Services, Department Commerce, senior advisor President's Commission Conversion. served Senate Budget Committee assistant executive director Conference Mayors. information visit Department Public Welfare www.dpw.state.pa.us (choose Children's Cabinet).
